_README: COPY THIS FILE to start a new theme. Steps: (1) copy _template.json -> <slug>.json. (2) fill name/slug/mode/description + all 17 tokens in OKLCH. (3) register one line in _index.json under a group. (4) run `node build-themes.mjs` to regenerate themes.css. That's it — the preview menu auto-populates from _index.json. Do NOT ship a theme with placeholder token values; every key must be a real OKLCH color. Delete this _README key in your copy.
name: Template (copy me)
description: Starter theme. Every token below is a role hint, not a final color — replace all 17. status:stub keeps it out of the generated CSS and the menu until you flip it to locked.

tokens.surface-1: oklch(0.99 0.003 260)  /* raised chrome: bars, part-header, nav */
tokens.surface-3: oklch(0.90 0.012 260)  /* highest elevation: footers, popovers, menus */
tokens.border: oklch(0.86 0.02 260)      /* dividers, field borders, grid lines */
tokens.text: oklch(0.28 0.02 260)          /* primary text, field text, titles */
tokens.accent-2: oklch(0.60 0.12 220)      /* secondary accent, highlighted titles, focus ring */
tokens.accent-soft: oklch(0.92 0.05 260)   /* tinted accent surface (solid, not alpha) */
tokens.on-accent: oklch(0.99 0.01 260)     /* text/icon sitting on an accent fill */
